UAEN

Vendors

Booths for electronics manufacturers, robotics teams, component shops, education projects, and FAET/NAU student startups.

Standard booth

Table + 2 seats, power, Wi-Fi.

Demo booth

More room for interactive demos and equipment.

Student booth

Discounted terms for FAET student teams and clubs.

Pricing and booth availability — TBD. Applications open alongside the CFP.

Questions about vendor booths — see Contacts.

Організатор — Факультет аеронавігації, електроніки та телекомунікацій (ФАЕТ), Національний авіаційний університет · Контакти
